title: Shikis Terraria Style Survival
description: Just a pack made to be similar to terraria while also changing up some survival aspects such as thirst, tinkers construct tools and a ore spawning overhaul
body:
This modpack is made to change and add to the progression and exploration of minecrafts current stale progression, adding things such as more survival aspects to worry about like thirst, oxygen and insanity.

This pack is made for those who wish to experience minecraft in a different way that vanilla, while it does have realistic survival aspects as thirst and geological ore deposites it still has fun stuff to mess around with like Hephaestus (Tinkers Construct) and Create with its many additions.
